name: neuroflix-video-player
description: Corporate training video player with Netflix-like experience, HLS streaming, and checkpoint questions

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:processor
scripts.clean: rimraf frontend/dist frontend/node_modules backend/dist backend/node_modules video-processor/dist video-processor/node_modules

author: Neuroflix Team
